changes.title: Army lists updated for version 2.26!
description: Readjusted points costs for most units in all factions, specifically chariots.
Magic Items have been updated to reflect the new changes, specifically the new points costs for banners.
__It is highly recommended that you review your existing lists and ensure they align with the new update.__
If an existing list does not reflect the new points cost then please create a new list.
